---
title: "Analysis of social media use by gender in the BES 2017 dataset"
author: "Daniel Allington"
date: "2026-03-06"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(readr)

d_socialmedia <- read_csv('../data/BES-2017-f2f-gender-fb-tw.csv')
```
